hero.title: Make Your Text Work Smarter, More Elegantly
hero.subtitle: Word Layouter is an intelligent plugin tailored for Office users, integrating advanced AI models to help you polish, layout, and generate content with one click.

intelligentWriting.title: Intelligent Writing and Polishing
intelligentWriting.desc: Expand, shorten, or polish based on context, supporting academic, professional, and literary tones.

nativeLayout.title: Native Document Layout
nativeLayout.desc: Generate native Word document sections with one click, including proper headings, tables, and lists.

formulaProcessing.title: Mathematical Formula Processing
formulaProcessing.desc: Automatically recognize LaTeX formulas and convert them to editable Word native formulas, the perfect companion for thesis work.

install.title: How to Get Started?
install.description: Simple steps to start your intelligent creation journey in Word.

1.title: Download Installer
1.desc: Download and unzip the installer.zip file.

2.title: Run Installer
2.desc: Enter the unzipped directory and double-click to run install.bat.

3.title: Start Using
3.desc: Open Microsoft Word, click the 'Start' tab, and find the Word Layouter icon in the ribbon.

footer: © 2026 Word Layouter. Powered by advanced AI models.
